name: 72" Rust Resistant Shower Curtain Rod Brass - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of luxury to your bath space with this Rust-Resistant Shower Curtain Rod from Threshold™. Made of metal, this shower rod is resistant to rust to help keep it looking like new for longer. This 41.9-inch curtain rod can be extended to 72 inches, making it adaptable to a wide range of room sizes. Plus, it's designed in a brass finish to complement a variety of decor styles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
